resources.string: PaisaTracker is a personal expense tracking app that helps you manage UPI payments and transactions. All data is stored locally on your device with no internet permissions required.

PaisaTracker reads UPI payment notifications from apps like GPay, PhonePe, and Paytm, and bank SMS messages, to automatically detect expenses. No notification content is shared with any server or third party. All processing happens entirely on your device. Data never leaves your phone. You can disable this at any time in Settings → Auto-capture. This permission is optional - you can manually add transactions instead.
